problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
